goals.statement: Make profit on Kalshi prediction markets with consistent positive PnL
goals.current_strategy: Run the existing Kalshi pipeline. Monitor PnL daily via decision_quality_report.py and trades.db. If PnL trends negative over 10+ trades, tighten edge threshold, narrow categories, or reduce sizing. If positive, optimize for volume at the same edge. Adapt using the performance optimizer (auto_evolve.py). Report to #kalshi.

outcomes.lessons: Pipeline is stable, added risk rules

learnings.lesson: Kalshi pipeline is stable when run every 2h

goals.statement: Make profit trading cryptocurrency with positive net PnL
goals.current_strategy: Run crypto paper trading via crypto_auto.py (CoinGecko signals, paper ledger). Cycle every 4h: check exits, score new candidates, rebalance. Monitor PnL vs $10k baseline. When paper shows 5+ trades with >55% win rate, evaluate Coinbase API live execution. Known issues: CoinGecko 24h change values need format correction; scoring is conservative (RSI-based mean reversion).

actions_taken.action: Initialized crypto paper trading pipeline - first cycle run
actions_taken.result: Created paper ledger at ~/clawd/crypto_ledger.json with $10k bankroll. Entered 6 positions (UNI, SUSHI, SOL, ETH, LINK, ADA) at 50% deployed. Reported to #crypto channel.

goals.statement: Make profit swing trading stocks with Alpaca (SPY, QQQ, AAPL, etc.)
goals.current_strategy: Run the existing Alpaca swing bot. Monitor daily equity, PnL, and win rate via the daily review. If equity drops or win rate falls below 50%, trigger scoring weight adjustments via the self-improvement engine. Leverage the weekly optimization cycle. Use llm_macro_eval.py for macro-direction tuning. Report to #trading.
Building a test with sequential steps
